title: linum flavum var. serrulatum
intro: Linum flavum var. serrulatum, also known as yellow flax or golden flax, is a perennial plant species in the genus Linum, native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The plant's seeds and flowers have been traditionally used to support eye health, reduce inflammation, and alleviate menstrual cramps, as well as to lower cholesterol levels and improve skin conditions. Linum flavum var. serrulatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, as well as used topically in creams and ointments to harness its medicinal benefits.
